items.title: Indian Union Minister Jyotiraditya Scindia suggests carrying onions to beat heat amid heatwave conditions

items.title: Comey's seashell post got him indicted. But experts are sceptical the government can win
items.dek: Acting AG Todd Blanche said the case was investigated for months, adding "it's serious when you threaten the president."
items.body: Acting AG Todd Blanche said the case was investigated for months, adding "it's serious when you threaten the president."

items.title: Syria trial seen as first step on long road for Assad's victims
items.dek: There were highly charged scenes as former senior regime official, Atef Najib, appeared before a Damascus court.
items.body: There were highly charged scenes as former senior regime official, Atef Najib, appeared before a Damascus court.
